history.content:
<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while the goal is farther to the east and slightly north, but I need to navigate around the lava below. Moving forward keeps me on a safe path and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead contains lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I should turn to find a safe route; turning left will face North, where the path may continue safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north and the cell directly ahead is unknown, while the adjacent left and right cells on my row are both safe floor. Since I need to explore toward the goal and cannot see it yet, the safest useful move is to advance into the unknown cell in front of me.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, while the immediate left and right are open floor cells. Since I need to explore safely and there is no visible goal yet, moving forward is the best choice to reveal new space.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but the local map shows I am in a corridor with open space to my left and right, while walls block the sides farther out. To make progress and explore safely, I will move forward into the unknown cell ahead, since there is no visible lava and it may lead toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>

</thought>
<action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but the left and right side cells are open floor. Since I need to explore safely and I’m not blocked in front, the best next step is to move forward to reveal more of the map toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but I can already see that the open space around me is bounded by walls on the left and right in the current row. Since I need to explore safely and cannot determine a better route forward yet, I will turn right to inspect the east side and look for a safe path.
</thought>
<action>

<thought>
